MOSBRUCKER APPEARING FOR PLAINTIFF; NO APPEARANCE BY PRO PER DEFENDANT, RACHEL SMITH; CASE PROCEEDS AS A PROVE-UP WITHOUT DEFT. PLTF. MAKES AN ORAL MOTION TO HAVE THE COMPLAINT AMENDED TO DISMISS ANNABROOKE TEMPLE AS PLAINTIFF AND HAVE GAAP ADDED AS THE ONLY PLAINTIFF. COURT GRANTS THE MOTION. AFTER PLAINTIFF RESTS THE COURT RULES. PLTF SUBMITS A JUDGMENT. EVIDENCE IS WITHDRAWN AND RETURNED TO PLTF.
